Video.summary: A mine cave-in alters a rivalry between two men over the affections of a woman.
Video.title: The Watch

Video.summary: An unarmed Navajo sets out to avenge the murder and robbery of a Native elder.
Video.title: Experiment in Fear

Video.summary: A lawyer who has turned to the bottle is ostracized when he refuses to help a miner.
Video.title: Justice at Jackson Creek

Video.summary: Jason Barnes takes a job on a railroad with a plan to marry a railroad executive's daughter.
Video.title: Way Station

Video.summary: A criminal sentenced to hang invents a complicated omelet to delay his execution.
Video.title: The Hangtown Fry

Video.summary: Reuel Gridley pays off a bet by donating a bag of flour to a fund for the Civil War wounded.
Video.title: The $275,000 Sack of Flour

Video.summary: John J. Pershing, fresh out of West Point, tracks the renegades who robbed and murdered two Natives.
Video.title: To Walk with Greatness

Video.summary: A horticulturist heads out West to identify new plants and encounters challenges along the way.
Video.title: The Grass Man

Video.summary: A woman falls in love with a man she was planning to rob.
Video.title: The Vintage Years

Video.summary: Lawmen Pete Gabriel and Joe Phy were friends, then Kitty Bolton came along.
Video.title: Loss of Faith

Video.summary: Attorney William E. Borah defends a woman charged with murder in Nampa, Idaho.
Video.title: The Lion of Idaho

Video.summary: Crew chief Yank Van Duzen walks off a mining job in protest when the foremen ignore warnings.
Video.title: Grotto of Death

Video.summary: A Native acquitted of murder under Sioux law must contend with the white man's 'lynch law' justice.
Video.title: With Honesty and Integrity

Video.summary: Suspicious townspeople are drawn toward two brothers who spend their nights digging at a grave.
Video.title: Shadow of Violence

Video.summary: Bill Franklin stumbles upon a rich gold vein and names it after his wife.
Video.title: The Holy Terror

Video.summary: A San Francisco newspaperman with big plans struggles to make his business profitable.
Video.title: The Paper Dynasty

Video.summary: Stephen Austin travels with his companion Valdez to purchase land in the Mexican territory of Texas.
Video.title: A Book of Spanish Grammar

Video.summary: The mayor of El Paso seeks cleaner water for the city and attempts financing by selling main street.
Video.title: The Streets of El Paso

Video.summary: Mary likes the attention of many men, but that causes trouble when one is murdered over her.
Video.title: Queen of Spades

Video.summary: A man who claims he can resurrect the dead poses a problem for killer Bill Groat.
Video.title: Miracle at Boot Hill

Video.summary: A Civil War veteran tries to rid his hometown of terrorists.
Video.title: Coffin for a Coward

Video.summary: Lt. Robert Benson becomes torn when the woman he loves asks him for secret government information.
Video.title: Matter of Honor

Video.summary: A 15-year-old joins the Texas revolutionaries to avenge Davy Crockett's death at the Alamo.
Video.title: Davy's Friend

Video.summary: Dr. Charles Edwards arrives in a rough frontier town to set up practice.
Video.title: Pioneer Doctor

Video.summary: An Indian girl must save a treaty.
Video.title: The Other White Man

Video.summary: Native prisoners slip away from their captors and return to the warpath armed with stolen rifles.
Video.title: The Journey

Video.summary: Susan Magoffin, accompanying her husband West, becomes the first woman to travel the Santa Fe Trail.
Video.title: No Place for a Lady

Video.summary: A woman whose house is hit by a meteorite decides to sue God for damages.
Video.title: Canary Harris vs. the Almighty

Video.summary: A freight hauler marries a rich girl by mistake and has a week to court her before it is annulled.
Video.title: The Courtship of Carrie Huntington

Video.summary: A grizzled trail guide is retained to lead a dangerous trek through Native country.
Video.title: Hugh Glass Meets the Bear

Video.summary: Huldah Swanson is traveling west to meet her fiancé with $1000 sewn in her hat.
Video.title: The Hat That Huldah Wore

Video.summary: A prospector helps a dentist who has been beaten and robbed by bandits.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Cavity

Video.summary: Opportunist Monte Dunning uses the predictions of a fortune teller to intimidate his fellow miners.
Video.title: The Gypsy

Video.summary: A widowed magician saves his young apprentice.
Video.title: The Saga of Dr. Davis

Video.summary: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.
Video.title: A Man Called Abraham

Video.summary: The theft of turkeys being brought to market sets up a showdown between lawlessness and justice.
Video.title: The Great Turkey War

Video.summary: Judge Roy Bean names his town after a British actress who he loves but has never met.
Video.title: A Picture of a Lady

Video.summary: A cowboy becomes an expert baker while competing for the daughter of a rancher.
Video.title: Crullers at Sundown!

Video.summary: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.
Video.title: The Four-Dollar Law Suit

Video.summary: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.
Video.title: Brute Angel

Video.summary: A likable old miner starts losing friends when his luck takes a turn for the better.
Video.title: One Fast Injun

Video.summary: A psychic leads the way to rescue ambush survivors.
Video.title: The Man Who Wouldn't Die
